SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, FILED BY PLAINTIFF FIEDELMAN, LINDAY AS TO DEFENDANT BENEDICT, MARVIN HUNTER BENEDICT, AMANDA
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $40.00 - SERVED AUG-31-2020, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT BENEDICT, MARVIN HUNTER

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF FEB-09-2021 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF FEB-09-2021 BY MICHELLE TONG. DISCLOSURE IS MADE. PLAINTIFF LINDAY FIEDELMAN IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT MARNVI HUNTER BENEDICT IS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT AMANDA BENEDICT IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF FIEDELMAN, LINDAY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BENEDICT, MARVIN HUNTER BENEDICT, AMANDA $3,470.41 PRINCIPAL, $155.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,625.41 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
